subject: Remove the Log4j 1.2.15
commit_message:
Remove the Log4j 1.2.15

Remove the log4j 1.2.15 brought by Sigar library + update ESAPI to support slf4J instead of log4j

Issue-ID: SDC-3310
Signed-off-by: sebdet <sebastien.determe@intl.att.com>
Change-Id: I63cee67d113f51dbe82a64c69629c62b47918103
Signed-off-by: sebdet <sebastien.determe@intl.att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Thank you for fixing this one!

Patch Set 1:

what about transitive dependencies on log4j brought by others library 
ex:

catalog-be -> <groupId>org.onap.dmaap.messagerouter.dmaapclient</groupId>
catalog-be -> <groupId>org.onap.aaf.authz</groupId>
catalog-fe -> <groupId>org.onap.portal.sdk</groupId>

shouldn't we remove them also?

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/sdc-master-verify-java/6842/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/sdc-master-verify-java/6842

Patch Set 1:

yep, i have seen that
Removing them as well
